name: Crayola Broad Line Markers (12 Count), Washable Markers for Kids, Assorted Colors, Arts & Crafts Supplies, For Coloring Books & Art Projects, Ages 3+
bullets: 12 CRAYOLA MARKERS: 12 dazzling Crayola Broad Line Markers to ignite your artistry & celebrate your chromatic flair!
BROAD LINE MARKERS: Boldly craft powerful expressions, master shading & layering, & explore boundless creativity.
WASHABLE FORMULA: Fear stains no more! Ultra Clean Washable Markers wash easily from skin, clothes, & surfaces.
INSPIRE CREATIVITY: Provide countless hours of enchanting artistry for kids and trusty coloring buddies for parents.
ESSENTIAL SCHOOL SUPPLIES: Embark on an epic back-to-school journey with versatile Crayola markers for notes, projects & artistic feats!
GIFT FOR KIDS: Ignite artistry & imagination with our vibrant marker set that makes a great gift for kids.
description: The Crayola Broad Line Markers feature a remarkable set of 12 dazzling colors designed to stoke the fires of your artistic creativity. These markers empower your bold, powerful expressions, with thick lines that let you conquer shading, layering, and creating to your heart's content. Fear stains no more as these markers boast an Ultra Clean Washable Formula, effortlessly washing off skin, clothes, and surfaces. These markers are an open invitation to a world of creativity, providing countless hours of fun and artistic exploration for kids. As the new school year approaches, make sure your chil

reviews.name: Emma Layton
reviews.title: Classic, Bright, and Mom Approved
reviews.body: You can never go wrong with Crayola markers! I bought these to do crafts with my son, and I’ve been so happy with them. The colors are vibrant, they glide on smoothly, and they make any little project feel fun and creative.One of the biggest reasons I love them is that they’re washable. It gives me so much peace of mind knowing that when he gets a little older and starts using them more…

reviews.name: Kelsea
reviews.body: The Crayola Broad Line Markers are perfect for creative kids! The colors are vibrant and bold, and the broad tips make coloring large areas fast and fun.They’re easy for little hands to hold, and the ink flows smoothly without skipping. Cleanup is simple, and the markers last a long time with regular use.A classic, high-quality art supply that keeps kids engaged and creative — highly recommend!…

reviews.name: D.Ellen
reviews.title: Perfect for kids!
reviews.body: The Crayola Broad Line Markers are a must-have for any home with kids! The colors are vibrant and bold, and the broad tips make coloring easy and fun, especially for little hands.What I love most is that they are truly washable — they come off skin, clothes, and surfaces without any hassle, which is a huge win for parents.The markers don’t dry out quickly and hold up well even with frequent use.…

reviews.name: Mick
reviews.title: Perfect Markers for Kids — Colorful, Washable, and a Big Win at Home!
reviews.body: These Crayola Broad Line Markers have become one of the best things in our art drawer. The moment we opened the box, my kids grabbed their favorite colors and got to work. The ink is super bold and smooth, which makes their drawings look bright and full of life. They love how fast they can color big areas with the thick tip, but they also figured out how to make smaller lines by angling the…
